name: LED Emergency Light With Adjustable Duel Heads And Battery Backup
description: This LED emergency light provides reliable illumination during power outages, making it ideal for a variety of commercial and industrial applications. With two adjustable LED heads and a long-lasting battery, it ensures visibility and safety when it matters most.
short_desc: Features: Provides 90 minutes or more of emergency lighting Two adjustable LED light heads for targeted illumination Durable thermoplastic housing for long-term use UL 924 Listed for safety and code compliance Wide input voltage: AC 120–277V Applications: Emergency lighting Safety and egress code compliance in commercial and industrial buildings

images.alt: LED Outdoor Emergency Light With Adjustable Duel Heads And Battery Backup

meta_title: LED Emergency Light With Adjustable Duel Heads And Battery Backup
